All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

W

WAIT_DRAW - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameStatus
the wait_Draw Status is the phase of the game where the player gets draws a card from the deck or from the available.
WAIT_IN_LOBBY - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of waiting for the other players to join the lobby.
WAIT_OBJECTIVE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameStatus
the wait_objective Status is the phase of the game where the player gets his objectives and his hand.
WAIT_PLACE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameStatus
the wait_place Status is the phase of the game where the player places a card.
WAIT_START_CARD_SIDE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameStatus
the wait_start_card_side Status is the phase of the game where the player gets his starting card.
WAIT_TOKEN - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameStatus
the wait_token Status is the phase of the game where the player gets his token.
WaitDrawCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the WaitDrawCard class implements the State interface and represents the action of drawing a card by the player.
WaitDrawCard(GameController) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states.WaitDrawCard
the method WaitDrawCard sets the game status at wait_draw.
WaitEndGameDraw - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the WaitEndGameDraw class implements the State interface and represents the lasts drawings of each player.
WaitEndGameDraw(GameController) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states.WaitEndGameDraw
the WaitEndGameDraw sets the status of the game at wait_draw.
WaitEndGamePlace - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the WaitEndGamePlace class implements the state interface and represents the lasts placings of each player.
WaitEndGamePlace(GameController) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states.WaitEndGamePlace
the WaitEndGamePlace class sets the status of the game at wait_place.
WaitObjective - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the WaitObjective class implements the State interface and is the forth phase of the game.
WaitObjective(GameController) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states.WaitObjective
the WaitObjective method sets the game status at wait_objective and makes the player visualize his hand and the public objectives.
WaitPlaceCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the WaitPlaceCard class implements the State interface and represents the action of placing card by the player.
WaitPlaceCard(GameController) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states.WaitPlaceCard
the WaitPlaceCard sets the status of the game at wait_place and notify the player that's his turn.
WaitStartCardSide - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the WaitStartCardSide class implements the State interface and manages the second state of the game, in this state to the player will be given the starting card of which he will choose the side, and it will be initialized his kingdom.
WaitStartCardSide(GameController) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states.WaitStartCardSide
the method WaitStartCardSide sets the status of the game at wait_start_card_side and initialize the field giving the Gold and Resource available cards, proceeding than to give the starting card to each player.
WaitToken - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the WaitToken class implements the State interface and manages the third phase of the game.
WaitToken(GameController) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states.WaitToken
the WaitToken method sets the status of the game in wait_token
WrongGamePhaseException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions
the WrongGamePhaseException is a class that represents an Exception in case a player sends a message in the wrong phase of the game.
WrongGamePhaseException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions.WrongGamePhaseException
WrongGamePhaseException is a setter method of the exception, which gives the message to send and calls the method of the super class.
